message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in function_gen.zig for super call detection

Add comprehensive handlers for exprHasSuperCall and stmtHasSuperCall:
- unaryop, boolop, compare expressions
- subscript with slice range (lower, upper, step)
- if_expr with condition, body, orelse_value
- list, tuple, dict containers
- fstring with all part types
- listcomp, dictcomp, genexp with generators
- lambda with body
- starred arguments and keyword_args
- with_stmt support
